Home.heroSubtitle: Serving Buyala with compassion and purpose.

Footer.mission: Empowering lives and inspiring hope through education, community building, and charitable outreach.
Footer.subscribeDesc: Subscribe to receive updates on our programs and impact.
Footer.allRightsReserved: Blessed To Bless Rehabilitation Center. All rights reserved.

ProgramsPage.subtitle: Targeted initiatives designed to break the cycle of poverty and bring holistic transformation to communities in need.

sponsorship.title: Sponsorship Program
sponsorship.description: Providing educational support, fees, and essential needs for vulnerable children to ensure they stay in school.

luminaSchool.title: Lumina Junior School
luminaSchool.description: Our foundational education center nurturing young minds with quality education and moral guidance.

agriculture.title: Agriculture & Value Addition
agriculture.description: Empowering communities with modern farming techniques to achieve food security and economic stability.

exPrisoners.title: Ex-Prisoners' Program
exPrisoners.description: We support reintegration through counseling, discipleship, employability training, and practical support as former prisoners rebuild their lives.

teenageGirls.title: Teenage Girls’ Engagement
teenageGirls.description: A safe and faith-centered program that nurtures confidence, dignity, health awareness, and leadership in girls across different age groups.

leadership.title: Leadership Empowerment
leadership.description: We equip youth and community leaders with communication, planning, and service-oriented leadership skills for long-term transformation.

communityOutreaches.title: Community Outreaches
communityOutreaches.description: Families receive practical support through vocational training, savings groups, and economic empowerment pathways.

schoolOutreaches.title: Schools Outreaches
schoolOutreaches.description: We partner with schools to provide scholastic materials, mentorship visits, and life-skills sessions that keep learners motivated and in class.

discipleship.title: Discipleship Training
discipleship.description: Deepening faith and building character through continuous spiritual education and mentorship.

elderlyFood.title: Elderly Food Outreaches
elderlyFood.description: Providing essential nutritional support and care packages to the vulnerable elderly in our communities.

parentsLivelihood.title: Parents' Livelihood
parentsLivelihood.description: Equipping parents through financial literacy and start-up support to sustain their families.

workspaces.title: Creation of Workspaces
workspaces.description: Setting up collaborative environments and vocational centers to foster skill development and business incubation.

medical.title: Medical Support Program
medical.description: Offering health outreach, medical camps, and essential healthcare funding for families without regular access to treatment.
